ticket.subject: New Website Migration
ticket.description:
Hello,
We currently implemented the PluginHive WooCommerce Shipping Services on our staging site https://staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com/

We noticed that it expires in 14 days.

What is the best way to complete this migration?

Is there anyway we can get a longer to that since we are currently paying for this on our live site 180rinks.ca?



Thanks in advance,
Shawn


--

Shawn Quait

Director, 180drinks.ca (https://180drinks.ca/)

Direct: 905.537.8806

Request #392154 "Welcome to PluginHive! We’re her..." was closed and merged into this request. Last comment in request #392154:

Hello staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com,

 Greeting from PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing **WooCommerce Shipping Services Plugin** on https://staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete plugin onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,

comments.body:
Hi Shawn,

Thank you for reaching out.

Could you please let us know the reason for installing the plugin on the staging site? Is there anything specific that you would like to test or verify?

Please share a few more details about your requirements so that we can better understand your use case and assist you accordingly.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Shawn,
 
Thank you for reaching out.
 
Could you please let us know the reason for installing the plugin on the staging site? Is there anything specific that you would like to test or verify?
 
Please share a few more details about your requirements so that we can better understand your use case and assist you accordingly.
 
Looking forward to your response.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi Priyanka,

We installed it on staging to test the shipping plugin before moving it live to 180drinks.ca.

Since the staging license expires in 14 days, we need to know the best way to complete the migration and if we can get an extension on that staging license since we are already paying for the live one.

Shawn

comments.body:
Hi Shawn,

Could you please let us know what type of migration you are referring to? Are you migrating a specific carrier setup such as FedEx, or are you referring to something else related to the shipping configuration?

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Shawn,
 
Could you please let us know what type of migration you are referring to? Are you migrating a specific carrier setup such as FedEx, or are you referring to something else related to the shipping configuration?

comments.body:
Hi Shawn,

Thank you for sharing the details.

We would like to better understand your requirements and assist you with the setup, migration process, and the checkout rates behaviour.
However, I am currently unable to access the staging site using the details provided. To help resolve this quickly and review the setup properly, I would strongly recommend booking a call with us using the link below.

During the call, we can review the setup together.

Please book a call at your convenience using the link below:
[Book a call]

Looking forward to assisting you.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:

However, I am currently unable to access the staging site using the details provided. To help resolve this quickly and review the setup properly, I would strongly recommend booking a call with us using the link below.
 
During the call, we can review the setup together.

comments.body:
Call summary : Customer has staging site and has set up shipping plugin so they can test everything before making the website live.
Customer ships within domestic and wants to show rates based on shipping class as well. Customer has added canada post. However the products are not getting imported in the app. We tried manually import and sync webhooks but webhooks are not synced
Raisning l3 for this
mail sent to customer
One more call might be needed once the product import issue is resolved
comments.html_body:
Call summary : Customer has staging site and has set up shipping plugin so they can test everything before making the website live. 
Customer ships within domestic and wants to show rates based on shipping class as well. Customer has added canada post. However the products are not getting imported in the app. We tried manually import and sync webhooks but webhooks are not synced 
Raisning l3 for this 
mail sent to customer
One more call might be needed once the product import issue is resolved

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1780057556989929

WooCommerce products are not being imported into WSS, which is further causing failures in rate calculation. This is a staging site.

Troubleshooting done from our end:
- Checked the WSS Debugger and observed that the webhooks are deleted
- Tried re-syncing/re-subscribing the webhooks, but the process failed
- Manually imported the products for testing



Could you please check and help identify the reason why the WooCommerce products are not getting imported into WSS?
The customer has already provided access details.

Requesting your assistance in checking this further and helping restore the product import.

Store URL : https://staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com
AcID: 9f18b55a-87e4-4d24-8474-5916eb8653d1

First page:

comments.body:
Hello Shawn Quait,

Thank you for your patience.

Upon checking your case, we observed the following -
- Your site is enabled with Basic Authentication and the same was added in the plugin. This has been updated now from our end.
- You are currently using a outdated version of the plugin. Please update the plugin using the attached zip file to the latest version.


Once done, please try initiating the product import in the plugin manually and let us know how it goes.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Shawn Quait,
 
Thank you for your patience.
 
Upon checking your case, we observed the following - 
  • Your site is enabled with Basic Authentication and the same was added in the plugin. This has been updated now from our end.
  • You are currently using a outdated version of the plugin. Please update the plugin using the attached zip file to the latest version.
 
Once done, please try initiating the product import in the plugin manually and let us know how it goes.
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Shawn Quait,

Thank you for your response.

The error you are highlighting is different from the product import error.

The error screenshot you have shared is because at the time this log was created, the Ship From Address details were not configured in the plugin. So, the rates were failing due to this.

For the product import, the error (if available) will not be visible anywhere in the plugin.

Request you to let us know when the IP Addresses are whitelisted by the hosting team.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Shawn Quait,
 
Thank you for your response.
 
The error you are highlighting is different from the product import error.
 
The error screenshot you have shared is because at the time this log was created, the Ship From Address details were not configured in the plugin. So, the rates were failing due to this.
 
For the product import, the error (if available) will not be visible anywhere in the plugin.
 
Request you to let us know when the IP Addresses are whitelisted by the hosting team.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello,

Currently we can't ship alcohol outside Ontario, so I wondering why in the staging site https://staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com/ its letting us ship alcohol outside Ontario. It seems to be configured the same as our live site 180drinks.ca



Screenshot below. How do we prevent the site from displaying rates for alcohol products if they are in this shipping class?

For example here is the alcoholic product we only want to be able to ship in Ontario: https://staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com/rum-tasting-kit/



We want to be able to still ship non-alcoholic products outside Ontario for products in these urls:  https://staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com/bartender-tools/ and https://staging180drinksca.bigscoots-staging.com/non-alcoholic-drink-gifts/

 ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/kGhHsMTbeierc92VhQCNpMpk0/?name=image.png)

We look forward to assisting you.

This will keep our team motivated.
 
Feel free to reachout to us anytime you need assistance from our end.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Call Summary:
Customer is selling both alcohol and non-alcohol accessories. The customer has a license to ship alcohol only within Ontario (ON) and cannot ship alcohol to other provinces/states. They needed help setting up shipping rules based on the following conditions:
1. When the cart contains alcohol or a mixed cart (alcohol + accessories) and the shipping destination is Ontario (ON):
  - Show Canada Post services
  - Offer Free Shipping for orders above CAD 175

2. When the cart contains alcohol or a mixed cart and the shipping destination is outside Ontario (ON):
  - No shipping options should be displayed from the plugin, including Free Shipping

3. When the cart contains only non-alcohol products:
  - Show shipping options and free shipping as they are allowed to ship anywhere

The shipping class was already configured before the call. We updated the shipping rules accordingly and tested checkout using different cart combinations and destinations. We confirmed that all scenarios are working as expected.

Customer was happy with the setup and also provided a review.

Call recording -

    • Show Canada Post services
    • Offer Free Shipping for orders above CAD 175
  2. When the cart contains alcohol or a mixed cart and the shipping destination is outside Ontario (ON):
    • No shipping options should be displayed from the plugin, including Free Shipping
  3. When the cart contains only non-alcohol products:
    • Show shipping options and free shipping as they are allowed to ship anywhere
The shipping class was already configured before the call. We updated the shipping rules accordingly and tested checkout using different cart combinations and destinations. We confirmed that all scenarios are working as expected.
 
Customer was happy with the setup and also provided a review.

comments.body:
**Review Details:**
**From:** Canada
**To:** Within Canada
**Products Sold:** Alcohol and other bar accessories
**Carrier:** Canada Post
**Requirement:** Customer wanted to display calculated shipping rates and free shipping while restricting alcohol shipments to a specific zone (Ontario). Shipping for alcohol products should only be allowed within the permitted zone, while non-alcohol products can be shipped across Canada.
